case_title: TUNQUE, JUNE et al vs. PRETISS. RICKEY et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2001 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUNQUE, JUNE TRAN, VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT PRETISS. RICKEY WASHINGTON, RICKEY DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-02-2001 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-02-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-13-2001

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FILIPPELLI JOSEPH. HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2001, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED 4-4-01.

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-11-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-11-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY JOSEPH A FILIPPELLI, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-30-2001 CONTINUED FROM APR-11-2001 TO JUN-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON JAN-30-2001, SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTY JOSEPH A FILIPPELLI, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2001 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
